price: A la carte for sushi/sashimi; $55 for Hibachi
reservations: Required for Hibachi; Highly recommended for Sushi
what_makes_it_unique: Izumi offers an authentic Asian dining experience with both exquisite, freshly prepared sushi and sashimi, and interactive hibachi grill entertainment. Guests can choose between a quiet sushi bar experience or the lively, theatrical cooking of the hibachi chefs.
warnings: The exact cover charge for Hibachi can occasionally vary by ship or sailing.
Lunch availability is typically limited to sea days and may not be offered on all itineraries.
